channel.title: ASEAN Battle of Hackers 2023 Challenges on jigsaw
channel.description: Recent content in ASEAN Battle of Hackers 2023 Challenges on jigsaw

item.title: CRACKSTORE
item.description: Attachments: File to Download Challenge Description: I recently made a backup of my “Windows Server” but I have forgotten the password.

item.title: Fur Elise
item.description: Attachments: File to Download Challenge Description: Beethoven was quite petty lol: https://www.chosic.com/why-is-beethoven-fur-elise-so-popular-and-who-was-elise/

item.title: SCP 2.0
item.description: Attachments: File to Download Password to ZIP file: D!D_Y0U_try_scp1.0 Challenge Description: Site-19 has been breached by the Chaos Insurgency following the breach of Site-[REDACTED]. All personnel is required to follow Procedure-15A.

item.title: The Intern
UWU
item.description: Attachments: File to Download Password to ZIP file: ARE_you_r3@dY_4_@Nim3 Challenge Description: THIS CHALLENGE CONTAINS MALWARE, PLEASE OPEN IT IN A SAFE ENVIRONMENT I love Naruto so much I download everything about it!
